name: America First
description_short: American First Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit financial cooperative serving consumers and businesses since 1952, offering checking, savings, loans, and digital banking services.
description_long:
American First Credit Union originated in 1952 as a credit union serving grocery store workers and has since evolved into a community-focused financial institution offering services to the general public. The organization maintains its mission to improve financial well-being and help members reach their goals while enriching the communities it serves. As a credit union, it operates as a member-owned cooperative rather than a for-profit bank, with governance and profits directed toward member benefit.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of retail financial products including personal checking and savings accounts, home loans, vehicle loans, credit cards, share certificates with special interest rates, and mobile banking access. For business members, American First provides business checking accounts, business savings accounts, SBA 7(a) loans, and commercial real estate lending. All members gain access to over 30,000 fee-free CO-OP ATMs nationwide and 24/7 digital banking through their mobile app and online platforms.

American First distinguishes itself through its credit union structure, which emphasizes member service over profit maximization, and its longevity in the market since 1952. The institution highlights financial wellness advisory services, exclusive digital coupon benefits through Advantage Checking accounts, and guaranteed returns on share certificate specials. Their fraud alert protocols and emphasis on direct verification demonstrate attention to member security.

As a credit union, American First's primary limitation is membership eligibility, which typically requires membership in the credit union to access most services. The website provides limited detail on specific loan terms, interest rates, or eligibility requirements, requiring prospective members to contact the institution directly. Digital service quality and mobile app functionality are not extensively detailed on the public-facing website.
services: Personal checking accounts (including Advantage Checking with digital coupons)
Share certificates with special interest rate terms
Online banking and digital bill payment
pros: Access to 30,000+ fee-free CO-OP ATMs nationwide for members
Credit union structure means member-owned with profits directed back to members rather than external shareholders
24/7 mobile banking app and digital services for account access and bill payment
Comprehensive product offerings including home loans, vehicle loans, SBA loans, and commercial real estate financing
Share certificate specials offering guaranteed returns with attractive interest rates
Advantage Checking accounts include exclusive digital coupons and financial wellness benefits
Established institution with 70+ years of operating history since 1952
cons: Membership eligibility requirements likely restrict access (typical for credit unions)
Website lacks transparent pricing, APR ranges, and specific loan terms for major products
Limited information about approval requirements, credit score minimums, or eligibility criteria
Business services appear more limited compared to offerings from larger financial institutions
No details on membership fees, minimum deposit requirements, or account opening specifics
best_for: Individuals seeking lower-cost financial services through member-owned cooperative structure
Consumers needing comprehensive lending products (auto, home, personal) from a single institution
Small business owners looking for SBA loans and commercial real estate financing
Members wanting broad ATM access and 24/7 digital banking convenience
diagnosis: American First Credit Union is best for consumers and small business owners who qualify for membership and seek comprehensive financial services from a member-owned institution with low fees and broad ATM access. The main caveat is that membership eligibility requirements apply, and the website provides minimal transparency on specific rates, terms, and approval criteria—requiring direct contact to the institution for detailed information.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.

meta_description: America First — NCUA-insured credit union in RIVERDALE, UT. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
